impact: Advances checkbox-72 by keeping the syntax-first sentinel contract intact while adding deterministic plain-function validation for unsafe public source inventory entries, including the one-unsafe-field fixture cases.
summary: Adds a sentinel-preserving public source inventory validator in one Python file without dataclasses.
target_task: Task checkbox-72: Retry the public source inventory validator as a sentinel-preserving one-file implementation only: keep `validator_status()` returning exactly `{"module": "ppd.contracts.public_source_inventory", "syntax_first_probe": True, "validator_ready": False}`, preserve `MODULE_PURPOSE`, avoid `dataclasses`, and add validator behavior only through separate plain functions/constants/dicts validated against the one-unsafe-field fixture.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
